title: DRDO RAC Jobs 2026 - Apply Online for 33 Scientist C, Scientist D and Other Posts
description: The Defence Research and Development Organisation Recruitment & Assessment Centre (DRDO RAC) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 33 Scientist C, Scientist D, and Scientist E Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech in Mechanical, Electrical, Computer Science, Electronics, Civil Engineering, and M. Pharm can apply for the DRDO R...
